Specialty & Craft

The Craft Tier

Single-origins, direct-trade sourcing, and precision roasting from Thailand's best highland terroirs.

Specialty Single Origin

Akha Ama Coffee

อาข่า อ่ามา คอฟฟี่

Maejantai Village, Chiang Mai

Founded by Lee Ayu Chuepa, an Akha tribesman from Maejantai village, Akha Ama directly sources exceptional arabica from his own community. A global specialty coffee benchmark that put Thai specialty coffee on the world map.

4.8
420 reviews
฿350–650
Specialty Single Origin

Ceresia Coffee Roasters

เซเรเซีย คอฟฟี่ โรสเตอร์ส

Bangkok (roasting) / Multiple Thai Origins

Ceresia is one of Bangkok's most respected specialty roasters, operating a flagship café-roastery. They source meticulously from Thai highlands and international origins, emphasizing transparency and traceability in every cup.

4.7
290 reviews
฿380–700
Specialty Single Origin

Roots Coffee Roaster

รูทส์ คอฟฟี่

Bangkok (roasting) / Northern Thailand + Imports

A pioneering Bangkok specialty roaster that helped spark Thailand's third-wave coffee movement. Roots sources from exceptional Thai highlands and global origins, roasting each to highlight origin character over process.

4.7
340 reviews
฿350–680
specialty single-origin

Doi Tung

ดอยตุง

4.6 / 5 ฿220–380
specialty single-origin

Doi Chaang Coffee

ดอยช้าง คอฟฟี่

4.6 / 5 ฿280–480
specialty single-origin

Gallery Drip Coffee

แกลเลอรี่ ดริปคอฟฟี่

4.5 / 5 ฿320–600
specialty arabica

Hillkoff

ฮิลล์คอฟฟ์

4.3 / 5 ฿180–420
specialty arabica

Bluekoff

บลูคอฟฟ์

4.3 / 5 ฿200–380

Understanding Thai Coffee

From Mountain Arabica
to Southern Robusta

Thailand's coffee-growing regions produce strikingly different cups. Northern highland arabica from Chiang Rai and Chiang Mai offers floral, fruit-forward brightness. Southern robusta from Surat Thani delivers the bold, earthy punch of classic Thai coffee shop culture.

Read the Buyer's Guide

Commercial & Widely Available

Everyday Thai Coffee

Bold, reliable, and found everywhere from 7-Eleven to Makro. These are the coffees that built Thai coffee culture.

Where to Find Thai Coffee

🏪

Convenience Stores

7-Eleven and FamilyMart stock commercial staples: Khao Shong, Birdy, Café Amazon. Grab-and-go drip bags are common.

Khao Shong · Birdy · Café Amazon

🛒

Supermarkets

Big C, Lotus's, Tops, and Makro carry the broadest range — from budget blends to premium highland arabica.

All commercial brands · Doi Tung · Wawee

📦

Online: Shopee & Lazada

Best selection and prices for specialty brands. Look for official brand shops and check reviews for freshness.

All brands · Best for specialty

☕

Brand Cafés & Roasteries

Visit Akha Ama (Chiang Mai), Ceresia or Roots (Bangkok), or Doi Tung shops for the freshest retail bags.

Akha Ama · Ceresia · Roots · Doi Tung
